function.message: I reviewed the next inbox item but cannot safely complete its deletion request as written. I found the day-job exception project (Dockflow Exception Radar), but I could not find a canonical project record for “sailboat refit notebook” in the project lane; it appears only as an idea inside a knowledge note. Without two canonical project records/start dates, I can’t determine which one started earlier, so I made no mutations.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item and deletion safety rules: do not guess deletion targets when evidence is not uniquely supported; if blocked on clarification, do not mutate workspace or delete inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requires comparing two project start dates and deleting the earlier one. Canonical project evidence exists for Dockflow Exception Radar in 40_projects/2026_04_25_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD, but no canonical project file for 'sailboat refit notebook' was found; the phrase appears in 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md as an unscheduled idea, not a project record. Under 99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md, deletion is unsafe when evidence does not uniquely support a target.
